title: Top 10 Viewpoints in Madeira: The Island's Most Spectacular Panoramas
description: From the glass-floored skywalk above Cabo Girão to a boat's-eye view of the cliffs — the ten best viewpoints in Madeira, with practical details for each.
heroAlt: The towering basalt wall of Cabo Girao rising from the sea

title: Madeira Summer 2026: The Complete Festival & Events Calendar (June–August)
description: Atlantic Festival fireworks, São João bonfires, the Limpet Festival and the Madeira Wine Festival — everything happening in Madeira from June to August 2026, and how to plan around it.

keywords: things to do in Madeira summer

title: Dolphins and Whales in Madeira: Complete Cetacean Watching Guide
description: Which species live in Madeira's waters, when to go, how close you can get, and why a private boat changes everything — a complete guide to dolphin and whale watching from Funchal.
heroAlt: Wild dolphins swimming beside a boat in Madeira's blue water

title: Madeira's Natural Pools: The Complete Guide to Swimming in Volcanic Lava Pools
description: Porto Moniz, Seixal, Doca do Cavacas and beyond — a complete guide to Madeira's best natural lava rock pools, how to get there, and what to bring.
heroAlt: The natural volcanic pools of Seixal on Madeira's north coast

title: What to Eat and Drink in Madeira: The Complete Food Guide
description: From espetada and bolo do caco to poncha, lapas and Madeira wine — a practical guide to the food and drink that defines the island.
heroAlt: Glasses of wine raised against a Madeira sunset aboard a private boat

title: Best Time to Visit Madeira: A Month-by-Month Guide
description: Spring or summer? Rainy season or peak crowds? A practical month-by-month guide to when to visit Madeira — and when to book your boat trip from Funchal.
heroAlt: Madeira's dramatic green sea cliffs seen from the Atlantic

title: Top 10 Things to Do in Madeira (From People Who Live on the Water)
description: The 10 experiences worth your time in Madeira — from Cabo Girão and hidden coves to dolphins, levadas and the best sunset on the island.
